name: blankdean-claude-plugins
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins for productivity, development, and automation

plugins.name: git-smart-commit
plugins.description: Analyzes staged changes and generates conventional commit messages with scope detection

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Performs structured code reviews with severity ratings, OWASP checks, and inline suggestions

plugins.name: test-generator
plugins.description: Generates unit tests for functions and classes with edge case coverage and mocking support

plugins.name: doc-generator
plugins.description: Generates JSDoc, docstrings, or type annotations for undocumented code

plugins.name: dep-auditor
plugins.description: Scans project dependencies for security vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and unused imports
